item.name: Crimson Kelp
item.description:
Found in every corner of the Ruby Sea, this kelp is known and loved for its culinary versatility.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A number of Far Eastern gastronomical experts rate crimson kelp among the most indispensable ingredients in Far Eastern cuisine. Prepared in a multitude of mouthwatering ways, it sees use in stock, seasoning, and as a dish unto itself.
